briefdescription.para: This table contains the function pointers for all possible states.

detaileddescription.para: The order of elements must match the XHdmi_MenuType enumerator definitions.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the HDMI main menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the HDMI edid menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the HDMI debug menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the HDMI debug menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the HDMI debug menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function displays the HDMI main menu.
This function displays the HDMI edid menu.
This function displays the debug menu.
This function displays the debug menu.
This function displays the debug menu.
This function outputs the video timing , Audio, Link Status, HDMI RX state of HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

briefdescription.para: This function prints additional details of the system for debug purpose.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmi_Menu *InstancePtr, u32 UartBaseAddress, u8 *ForceIndependentPtr, u8 *SystemEventPtr, u8 *IsTxPresentPtr, u8 *IsRxPresentPtr, void *ChangeColorbarOutputCB, void *ConfigureTpgEnableInputCB, void *ToggleHdmiRxHpdCB)
memberdef.name: XHdmi_MenuInitialize

briefdescription.para: This function takes care of the HDMI menu initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmi_Menu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the menu to the main menu.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmi_Menu instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to TI TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to TI_TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to trigger the HDMI menu statemachine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmi_Menu instance.
is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the HDMI example design.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xhdmi_menu.h for more details.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
X.X .. DD-MM-YYYY .. 1.0 mmo 30-04-2019 Initial version 1.1 ku 14-07-2020 Menu option for 4K Quad selection Menu option for 16 BPC
